name: property managers overseeing 5–15 rental units tool
description: For property managers overseeing 5–15 rental units, inconsistent maintenance scheduling causes tenant complaints. We provide a subscription-based equipment maintenance tracking system instead of manual tracking through spreadsheets and emails.
problem_solved: Inconsistent maintenance scheduling leads to tenant complaints.
